name: cowork-shortcuts-pack
description: Bundled workflow shortcuts inspired by common CoWork command patterns for files, research, email, calendar, reports, writing, and scheduled routines.
author: CoWork OS
outcomeExamples: Trigger reusable workflow prompts from the message box with slash commands
Run common file, research, email, calendar, writing, and report workflows by name
Discover practical CoWork shortcuts next to existing skills
tryAsking: /strategy Create a launch strategy for my new product
/batch-rename Rename files in Downloads using dates and clear descriptions
/gmail-summary-drive Triage unread email and save a daily summary

skills.name: Strategy
skills.description: Build a strategic canvas covering vision, goals, audience, positioning, business model, pricing, and launch planning.

skills.name: Review Checklist
skills.description: Build a custom review checklist for content, code, proposals, or other work.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Optional work type or artifact to review

skills.name: Memory Debugger
skills.description: Inspect what context and memory may be influencing the current task.

skills.name: Batch Rename
skills.description: Rename files with intelligent, consistent names based on contents and dates.

skills.name: Smart Deduplication
skills.description: Find true and near duplicate files and show candidates before deletion.

skills.name: Folder Structure
skills.description: Turn a messy folder into a logical structure and summarize what moved.

skills.name: Archive Stale Files
skills.description: Move stale files to an archive while protecting active paths.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Folder, age threshold, and protected paths

skills.name: Template Generator
skills.description: Reverse-engineer completed work into a reusable blank template.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Example files or desired template type

skills.name: Recursive Search Extract
skills.description: Search documents recursively, extract relevant passages, and cite sources.

skills.name: Format Converter
skills.description: Batch convert files while preserving structure and filenames.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Source format, target format, and folder

skills.name: Size Audit
skills.description: Find large files and estimate recoverable storage with context.

skills.name: Gmail Summary to Drive
skills.description: Categorize unread email, draft routine replies, and save a dated summary.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Mailbox scope, date, or Drive destination

skills.name: Calendar Prep Brief
skills.description: Create meeting prep briefs from calendar events and attendee context.

skills.name: Slack Action Items
skills.description: Extract action items directed at you from recent Slack context.

skills.name: Drive Analysis Slides
skills.description: Turn spreadsheet insights into a short slide deck with charts.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Spreadsheet, Drive file, or analysis question

skills.name: Email Chain Resolver
skills.description: Summarize an email thread and draft a forward-moving reply.

skills.name: Multi-Source Report
skills.description: Combine data from files, email, and chat into one formatted report.

skills.name: Meeting Notes Distributor
skills.description: Extract personal action items from notes and draft targeted follow-ups.

skills.name: Cross-Platform Search
skills.description: Find everything about a project across connected sources.

skills.name: Voice Note Draft
skills.description: Turn a transcript into a polished long-form draft while preserving voice.

skills.name: Meeting Recording Notes
skills.description: Convert a meeting transcript into structured notes and action items.

skills.name: Research Executive Brief
skills.description: Synthesize research into a concise executive brief with sources.

skills.name: Proposal Customizer
skills.description: Tailor a proposal template to a client brief.

skills.name: Contract Plain English
skills.description: Summarize key contract terms, deadlines, unusual clauses, and risks.

skills.name: Spreadsheet Narrative
skills.description: Explain spreadsheet trends for a non-technical audience.

skills.name: Content Repurposing
skills.description: Turn one piece of content into social posts, captions, and newsletter copy.

skills.name: Weekly Newsletter
skills.description: Assemble the strongest drafts into a weekly newsletter.

skills.name: Daily Inbox Zero
skills.description: Set up or run a daily inbox triage routine.

skills.name: Weekly File Cleanup
skills.description: Set up or run a recurring file cleanup workflow.

skills.name: Monday Planning Brief
skills.description: Prepare a weekly priorities and deadlines brief.

skills.name: Monthly Financial Organizer
skills.description: Process receipts or expenses into a categorized spreadsheet.

skills.name: Competitive Scan
skills.description: Scan competitor news, pricing changes, launches, and hiring.

skills.name: End of Day Log
skills.description: Summarize work completed, in progress, and needing attention tomorrow.
